structured.name: EV Driver Authorization using RFID
structured.objective:
To enable the Charging Station to request the CSMS to authorize an EV Driver to start or stop
charging.
structured.description:
When a Charging Station needs to charge an EV, it needs to authorize the EV Driver first before
the charging can be started or stopped.
scenario: 1. The EV Driver wants to start or stop charging the EV and presents an RFID card.
2. The Charging Station sends AuthorizeRequest to the CSMS to request authorization.

3. Upon receipt of AuthorizeRequest, the CSMS responds with AuthorizeResponse. This response
message indicates whether or not the IdToken is accepted by the CSMS.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The EV Driver is authorized and can start or stop charging.
Failure postcondition:
If the authorize message is Invalid, Blocked, Expired or Unknown, the EV Driver can not start or
stop charging, except in the case where the EV Driver presents the same token used to start the
transaction.
structured.error_handling:
When the Authorization is not 'Accepted', the AuthorizeResponse contains an authorization status
value indicating the reason for rejection.
structured.remarks:
Assuming idToken is valid for charging and the Charging Station has 3 EVSEs, what is the content
of idTokenInfo, when idToken is allowed to charge:
. at all EVES: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted.
. at EVSE 1: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted, idTokenInfo.evseId = [ 1 ].
. at EVSE 1 + 2: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted, idTokenInfo.evseId = [ 1, 2 ].
. at none of the EVSEs: _idTokenInfo.status=NotAtThisLocation.

requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL only offer energy after
authorization.

requirements.precondition:
If an idToken presented by the EV
Driver is not present in the Local
Authorization List or Authorization
Cache
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send
AuthorizeRequest to the CSMS to request
authorization.

requirements.precondition:
When an idToken is presented during
a transaction that has been authorized
AND
(a) the presented idToken is the same
as the idToken that started the
authorization
OR
(b) when the presented idToken is in
the Local Authorization List or
Authorization Cache AND is valid AND
has the same GroupIdToken as the
IdToken that started the authorization.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL end the authorization
of the transaction, without first sending an
AuthorizeRequest

AuthorizeRequest SHALL only be used for the
authorization of an identifier.

requirements.precondition:
If an IdToken is present in the Local
Authorization List or Authorization
Cache.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY send AuthorizeRequest
to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
When CSMS receives an
AuthorizeRequest for an idToken AND
the idToken has an associated
groupIdToken.
requirements.definition:
AuthorizeResponse sent by the CSMS to a Charging
Station SHALL include the associated
groupIdToken.

AuthorizeResponse SHALL include an authorization
status value indicating acceptance or a reason for
rejection.

requirements.precondition:
If the field: language1 is set AND the
Charging Station contains messages
in that language.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show messages to the
user in language1.

requirements.precondition:
If the field: language1 is set AND the
Charging Station does not contain
messages in that language AND if the
field: language2 is set AND the
Charging Station contains messages
in that language
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show messages to the
user in language2.

requirements.precondition: If the field: language1 is not set
requirements.definition: The field: language2 SHALL NOT be set.

Field: language1 SHALL be different from field
language2.

It is RECOMMENDED to implement messages in
English as fall-back.

requirements.precondition:
If both language1 AND language2
don’t match installed languages in the
Charging Station
requirements.definition:
It is RECOMMENDED to show messages to the EV
Driver in English.

Language SHALL be specified as RFC-4646 tags,
see: [RFC5646], example: US English is: "en-US".

requirements.precondition:
If the IdToken is valid AND
the EV driver is NOT allowed to charge
at the type of EVSE(s) this Charging
Station provides.
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse with
idTokenInfo.status NotAllowedTypeEVSE.

requirements.precondition:
idToken is allowed for any EVSE of the
Charging Station
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which idTokenInfo has an empty (or absent) evseId
list.

requirements.precondition:
idToken is allowed for a subset of
EVSEs of the Charging Station
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which IdTokenInfo has an evseId list with the
allowed EVSEs.

The Charging Station SHALL only allow charging on
the EVSEs mentioned in the AuthorizeResponse.

requirements.precondition:
idToken is not allowed for any EVSE of
the Charging Station
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which idTokenInfo.status is NotAtThisLocation
and evseId list is empty (or absent).

requirements.precondition:
When a transaction is still active, that
had been authorized earlier by an
idToken, but which is now no longer
authorized for charging AND
a new idToken is presented to the
Charging Station for authorization,
that differs from the inital idToken
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHOULD NOT allow the
authorization of a different idToken.

requirements.precondition:
When a transaction is still active, that
had been authorized earlier by an
idToken, but which is now no longer
authorized for charging AND
Charging Stations sends an
AuthorizeRequest for a new idToken,
that differs from the inital idToken of
the transaction
requirements.definition:
The CSMS is RECOMMENDED to respond with an
AuthorizeResponse with idTokenInfo.status =
NotAtThisTime for this idToken.

Two IdTokenType elements are considered to be
equal when they have the same value for the fields
idToken.idToken and idToken.type

requirements.precondition:
When an idToken has been authorized
and the EV Driver does not plug in the
charging cable before the timeout set
by the Configuration Variable:
EVConnectionTimeOut
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL end the authorization of
idToken

chunks.content:
# C01 - EV Driver Authorization using RFID

**Objective:** To enable the Charging Station to request the CSMS to authorize an EV Driver to start or stop
charging.

**Description:** When a Charging Station needs to charge an EV, it needs to authorize the EV Driver first before
the charging can be started or stopped.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
1. The EV Driver wants to start or stop charging the EV and presents an RFID card.
2. The Charging Station sends AuthorizeRequest to the CSMS to request authorization.
3. Upon receipt of AuthorizeRequest, the CSMS responds with AuthorizeResponse. This response
message indicates whether or not the IdToken is accepted by the CSMS.

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The EV Driver is authorized and can start or stop charging.
Failure postcondition:
If the authorize message is Invalid, Blocked, Expired or Unknown, the EV Driver can not start or
stop charging, except in the case where the EV Driver presents the same token used to start the
transaction.

**Error handling:** When the Authorization is not 'Accepted', the AuthorizeResponse contains an authorization status
value indicating the reason for rejection.

**Remarks:** Assuming idToken is valid for charging and the Charging Station has 3 EVSEs, what is the content
of idTokenInfo, when idToken is allowed to charge:
. at all EVES: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted.
. at EVSE 1: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted, idTokenInfo.evseId = [ 1 ].
. at EVSE 1 + 2: idTokenInfo.status = Accepted, idTokenInfo.evseId = [ 1, 2 ].
. at none of the EVSEs: _idTokenInfo.status=NotAtThisLocation.

metadata.heading: C01 - EV Driver Authorization using RFID

chunks.content:
# C01 - Requirements

**C01.FR.01**
Precondition: Configuration setting AuthEnabled is
true.
The Charging Station SHALL only offer energy after
authorization.

**C01.FR.02**
Precondition: If an idToken presented by the EV
Driver is not present in the Local
Authorization List or Authorization
Cache
The Charging Station SHALL send
AuthorizeRequest to the CSMS to request
authorization.

**C01.FR.03**
Precondition: When an idToken is presented during
a transaction that has been authorized
AND
(a) the presented idToken is the same
as the idToken that started the
authorization
OR
(b) when the presented idToken is in
the Local Authorization List or
Authorization Cache AND is valid AND
has the same GroupIdToken as the
IdToken that started the authorization.
The Charging Station SHALL end the authorization
of the transaction, without first sending an
AuthorizeRequest

**C01.FR.04**
AuthorizeRequest SHALL only be used for the
authorization of an identifier.

**C01.FR.05**
Precondition: If an IdToken is present in the Local
Authorization List or Authorization
Cache.
The Charging Station MAY send AuthorizeRequest
to the CSMS.

**C01.FR.06**
Precondition: When CSMS receives an
AuthorizeRequest for an idToken AND
the idToken has an associated
groupIdToken.
AuthorizeResponse sent by the CSMS to a Charging
Station SHALL include the associated
groupIdToken.

**C01.FR.07**
AuthorizeResponse SHALL include an authorization
status value indicating acceptance or a reason for
rejection.

**C01.FR.08**
Precondition: If the field: language1 is set AND the
Charging Station contains messages
in that language.
The Charging Station SHALL show messages to the
user in language1.

**C01.FR.09**
Precondition: If the field: language1 is set AND the
Charging Station does not contain
messages in that language AND if the
field: language2 is set AND the
Charging Station contains messages
in that language
The Charging Station SHALL show messages to the
user in language2.

**C01.FR.10**
Precondition: If the field: language1 is not set
The field: language2 SHALL NOT be set.

**C01.FR.11**
Field: language1 SHALL be different from field
language2.

**C01.FR.12**
It is RECOMMENDED to implement messages in
English as fall-back.

**C01.FR.13**
Precondition: If both language1 AND language2
don’t match installed languages in the
Charging Station
It is RECOMMENDED to show messages to the EV
Driver in English.

# C01 - Requirements (continued)

**C01.FR.17**
Language SHALL be specified as RFC-4646 tags,
see: [RFC5646], example: US English is: "en-US".

**C01.FR.18**
Precondition: If the IdToken is valid AND
the EV driver is NOT allowed to charge
at the type of EVSE(s) this Charging
Station provides.
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse with
idTokenInfo.status NotAllowedTypeEVSE.

**C01.FR.19**
Precondition: idToken is allowed for any EVSE of the
Charging Station
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which idTokenInfo has an empty (or absent) evseId
list.

**C01.FR.20**
Precondition: idToken is allowed for a subset of
EVSEs of the Charging Station
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which IdTokenInfo has an evseId list with the
allowed EVSEs.

**C01.FR.21**
Precondition: C01.FR.20
The Charging Station SHALL only allow charging on
the EVSEs mentioned in the AuthorizeResponse.

**C01.FR.22**
Precondition: idToken is not allowed for any EVSE of
the Charging Station
The CSMS SHALL send an AuthorizeResponse in
which idTokenInfo.status is NotAtThisLocation
and evseId list is empty (or absent).

**C01.FR.23**
Precondition: When a transaction is still active, that
had been authorized earlier by an
idToken, but which is now no longer
authorized for charging AND
a new idToken is presented to the
Charging Station for authorization,
that differs from the inital idToken
The Charging Station SHOULD NOT allow the
authorization of a different idToken.

**C01.FR.24**
Precondition: When a transaction is still active, that
had been authorized earlier by an
idToken, but which is now no longer
authorized for charging AND
Charging Stations sends an
AuthorizeRequest for a new idToken,
that differs from the inital idToken of
the transaction
The CSMS is RECOMMENDED to respond with an
AuthorizeResponse with idTokenInfo.status =
NotAtThisTime for this idToken.

**C01.FR.25**
Two IdTokenType elements are considered to be
equal when they have the same value for the fields
idToken.idToken and idToken.type

**C01.FR.26**
Precondition: When an idToken has been authorized
and the EV Driver does not plug in the
charging cable before the timeout set
by the Configuration Variable:
EVConnectionTimeOut
Charging Station SHALL end the authorization of
idToken
